series_metadata.series_description: Also termed Record of Clemency. Contains date of each application for pardon, reprieve, or commutation, the name of the convict, of what crime, in what county, at what term of court he/she was convicted, the sentence of the court, the action of the governor and date, and the reason for that action.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain in office area for four (4) years, then transfer to State Archives., Paper: Archives
